# Friday {#friday}


| Time   | Content             | Teaching form    | Teacher            |                 
| ------ | ------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------ |
| 9-11h  | <a href="## Presentations and final feedback"> **Presentations and final feedback** </a> | Plenary session | All teachers |
| [< 18h](#finalizepresentations) | **Finalize presentations**|  |


## Presentations and final feedback

●	Give a PowerPoint presentation
  - Each (group) presentation should have a duration of ± 20 minutes  
  - The structure of the presentation should follow the steps of the intervention mapping protocol and should include a summary of tasks of IM steps 1-5  
  - Give constructive feedback to your fellow students


## Finalize presentations {#finalizepresentations}

 - Process the feedback you have been given by prof Rob Ruiter and Dr GJ Peters to improve your slides  
 - Email the improved group presentation saved in PDF-format to N.Y.L.Oei@uva.nl before 18h
